seoTitle: Hernani vs Herons Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hernani and Herons Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hernani vs Herons Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hernani and Herons Creek.
heading: Hernani vs Herons Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hernani, New South Wales and Herons Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Herons Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Hernani (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hernani or Herons Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hernani has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Herons Creek scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hernani scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Herons Creek scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hernani or Herons Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Herons Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
